title: [Skyship, Exterior]
description: Large gaps in the half-wall that lines the metal path alongside the ship and divides the external walkway from a dark free-fall have been loosely covered by sections of thick rope netting.  These nets appear loose in spots, flapping vigorously in the chill winds that whip across the ship's exterior.  A series of tattered flags drape from the iron beams overhanging the walkway, their bright colors a contrast to the metallic exterior and the dark night sky.
